IoT button vendor. Supplies Flic Bluetooth buttons used for player-triggered scoring and replay capture. 2 buttons per court, mounted on the printed aluminum sign.

Buttons connect to the Mac Mini replay system via Bluetooth. Flic Hub or direct Bluetooth pairing — confirm pairing method with replay system setup guide.
